thirdParty.inner_html: Drive Awareness Reach and engage audiences at scale
Improve Performance Optimize campaigns for measurable outcomes
Reduce Waste Eliminate inefficiencies across media spend
Prove Impact Connect media to real business results
Open Internet Premium formats that drive attention
Platform The smarter system for more impactful advertising

DATA & AUDIENCES

Reach the right people everywhere

Learn More

SUPPLY & CURATION

Deliver in the right environments

Learn More

MEASUREMENT

Understand what works

Learn More

OPTIMIZATION

Improve continuously

Learn More
TL Direct Launch and manage campaigns instantly
Managed Service Hands-on support to plan, launch, and optimize

Taking a Pause: Turning CTV Creative Into Action

Taking a Pause: Turning CTV Creative into Action – Download our report to learn how creative technology is reshaping the CTV landscape and driving performance outcomes.

Learn More

Diverse Spend

Learn how TripleLift and an Independent Agency worked together to exceed spending goals on underrepresented voices supply and grew a partnership that’s larger than advertising.

Read Case Study

Adelaide

TripleLift partnered with Adelaide to measure a well-known beauty brand where the campaign’s high attention score successfully drove site and store visits.

Read Case Study

MediaScience

TripleLift elevates brand metrics- awareness, brand favorability, purchase intent- through a combination of High Impact CTV formats.

Read Case Study

CPG Brand

A popular candy brand aimed to increase adoption of their annual holiday product line. They sought to elevate brand awareness and deliver their messaging with high impact, non-intrusive CTV ad experiences across culinary-focused streaming channels.

Read Case Study

From Guesswork to Greatness: How Marketers are Redefining Effective Creative at Scale in Digital Advertising

A new report from TripleLift, the Creative SSP, and EMARKETER reveals how to build and scale effective creative that drives performance.

Learn More

The Creative Edge in Retail Media: Holiday Season Edition

The Creative Edge in Retail Media: Holiday Season Edition. Check out this guide to capitalize on peak consumer shopping activity.

Learn More
